channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports

item.title: FOX Sports' John Strong, Jenny Taft preview Westminster Dog Show
item.description: FOX Sports' John Strong and Jenny spoke with FOX News Digital about the 149th edition of the Westminster Dog Show that begins on Saturday.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: LeBron James becomes oldest player to score 40 points in NBA history, dropping 42 in Lakers' victory
item.description: LOS ANGELES (AP) — Age is more than just a number to LeBron James. It's also a target. The 40-year-old James became the oldest player to score 40 points in an NBA game Thursday night, putting up a season-high 42 in the Los Angeles Lakers' 120-112 victory over the Golden State Warriors.
item.dc:creator: GREG BEACHAM, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: Warriors' Kerr, Lakers' Redick host basketball team from Pacific Palisades high school hurt by fire
item.description: Steve Kerr and JJ Redick jointly hosted some special guests when Warriors took on the Lakers in downtown Los Angeles.
item.dc:creator: Greg Beacham, Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: Here's how the new NBA All-Star Game format works
item.description: SAN FRANCISCO (KRON) -- The NBA All-Star Game is coming to Chase Center for the first time on Feb. 16, but the game will not look like the All-Star Games that NBA fans are accustomed to.
item.dc:creator: Phil Mayer, KRON4

item.title: Jaguars' Arik Armstead wins Walter Payton Man of the Year at the NFL Honors event
item.description: NEW ORLEANS (AP) — Jacksonville Jaguars defensive end Arik Armstead, whose Armstead Academic Project supports early childhood education, was selected the Walter Payton Man of the Year on Thursday night.
item.dc:creator: BRETT MARTEL, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Josh Allen wins AP NFL Most Valuable Player award
item.description: NEW ORLEANS (AP) — Josh Allen wanted to leave New Orleans with different hardware. Still, he's happy to be recognized for his accomplishments. Allen edged two-time winner Lamar Jackson for the AP NFL Most Valuable Player award in the closest race since Matt Ryan beat out Tom Brady in 2016.
item.dc:creator: ROB MAADDI, Associated Press, PIX 11

item.title: How Josh Allen beat out Lamar Jackson for AP NFL MVP
item.description: NEW ORLEANS (AP) — For the past 11 seasons, being named the AP first-team All-Pro quarterback was a prelude to winning the NFL’s MVP award. There was some logic to that with quarterbacks providing the most value to a team and the same panel picking the All-Pro team and all of the awards.
item.dc:creator: JOSH DUBOW, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Antonio Gates, Jared Allen, Eric Allen and Sterling Sharpe make the Pro Football Hall of Fame
item.description: NEW ORLEANS (AP) — Antonio Gates, Jared Allen, Eric Allen and Sterling Sharpe were voted into the Pro Football Hall of Fame in the smallest induction class in 20 years following offseason rule changes meant to make it harder to get inducted.
item.dc:creator: JOSH DUBOW, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: Jared Allen, Antonio Gates headline Pro Football Hall of Fame Class of 2025
item.description: Jared Allen, Antonio Gates, Sterling Sharpe, and Eric Allen were announced as the newest inductees into the Pro Football Hall of Fame on Thursday.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Jimmy Butler joins the Warriors, says he has love for the Heat and is ready for another title shot
item.description: Moments before Jimmy Butler was handed a Golden State Warriors jersey for the first time, he made clear what his motivation is going forward.
item.dc:creator: Tim Reynolds, Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: Wyndham Clark shoots 7-under 64 to take 1st-round lead in Phoenix Open
item.description: SCOTTSDALE, Ariz. (AP) — A rough start to the season had Wyndham Clark digging through past notes, listening to old books — anything to get his mind out of the negative.
item.dc:creator: JOHN MARSHALL, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Gatorade colors, on-field proposals and other bizarre bets before Super Bowl LIX
item.description: Known as prop bets, the annual list of side wagers includes game-related stats as well as creative propositions that have nothing to do with how the Chiefs and Eagles play in the big game.
item.dc:creator: Jeremy Tanner, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Du Plessis puts middleweight title on the line in rematch with Strickland in UFC 312
item.description: Dricus Du Plessis disagrees that his previous fight with Sean Strickland should have been a split decision, but acknowledged he had to earn the victory that night just more than a year ago for the middleweight belt.
item.dc:creator: MARK ANDERSON, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: NCAA officially bans trans athletes from women's sports 1 day after Trump signs executive order
item.description: The NCAA has changed its gender eligibility rules to ban all biological males from women's sports, in a new policy released on Thursday.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: USU hits 20-win mark with 71-67 victory at Wyoming
item.description: LARAMIE, Wyo. (ABC4 Sports) - Coming off its most disappointing performance of the season, a 19-point loss at home to New Mexico, the Utah State basketball rebounded nicely with a hard-fought 71-67 victory at Wyoming Tuesday night.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Josh Giddey, Matas Buzelis score 24 to lead the Bulls over the Heat 133-124
item.description: Rookie Matas Buzelis scored a career-best 24 points and Josh Giddey matched it to help the Chicago Bulls top the Miami Heat 133-124 on Tuesday night.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: Boys Basketball: Tri City Christian 49, Army Navy 37
item.description: SAN DIEGO (KUSI)- Great game on Monday night in Vista with Tri City Christian hosting Army Navy. All tied up at 21 at halftime, the Eagles pulled off and won 49-37. Lead by Caleb Williams who hit for 14. Army Navy was lead by Yanler Ramos, he also poured in 14.
item.dc:creator: Nick James, Fox 5

item.title: Big 12 Conference unveils 2025 schedule, Utah and BYU to meet in October
item.description: It's a big day for college football fans as the Big 12 Conference released the full 2025 season schedule which includes the schedules for the Utah Utes and the BYU Cougars.
item.dc:creator: Derick Fox, ABC 4
